tasks.task: Identify candidate pools on Base via on-chain telemetry and DeFi aggregators.
tasks.observation: Identified Morpho USDC, Uniswap V3 WETH/USDC, and Aerodrome cbBTC/USDC as primary candidates.

tasks.task: Perform Risk Audit (Rug-pull assessment) on candidate pools.
tasks.observation: Audit scores: Uniswap (96), Morpho (90.3), Aerodrome (88.0). Protocol-level rug-pull risk is near zero for all; primary risk is front-end hijacking (Aerodrome) or curator misconfig (Morpho).

tasks.task: Analyze Yield vs. Volatility metrics for the 0.042 stability filter.

Perform Adversarial Audit of WETH/VIRTUAL range (0.4722 - 0.5411)
Verify mwUSDC Sanctuary floor stability at 2.02
